consistency.data_completeness: Complete. All expected fields for a spell entry are present.
consistency.format_adherence: High. Data structure matches typical D&D spell schema.

quality.naming_convention: Standard. 'False Life' is a recognized spell name.
quality.mechanics_clarity: High. Effect (temporary HP) and scaling ('At Higher Levels') are clearly defined.
quality.component_detail: Good. Material component (M) includes a specific, though minor, requirement (alcohol/spirits).

mechanics.scaling_mechanism: Additive. Gain +5 temporary HP per spell slot level above 1st.
